visual_description: A group of cyclists in colorful jerseys and helmets are riding bicycles in a line along a paved road, with some leaning forward in racing posture. The scene is outdoors under a clear blue sky, with rolling fields and trees visible in the background. One cyclist in a brown shirt looks toward the camera while others focus ahead, maintaining steady pedaling motions.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a medium pitch and moderate pace, speaking in a neutral tone without any noticeable prosody or inflection.
